title: Cheaper Banners
description: this datapack makes banners cheaper to craft AND more logical. why need 6 wool to craft one? (because steve ate the rest but thats besides the point)
body:
Ever wanted to craft abanner and thought to yourself, why the hell is it so expensive? Well, this datapack solves that problem AND makes the crafting recipe more logical as well. After all, a banner is 2 blocks tall and 1 block wide so why is its crafting recipe 3 blocks wide?

This datapack supports all 16 colors of banners and if minecraft says "incompatible version" just ignore it.

Discord: Zyqwyx
